keyword: outdoor pet camera treat dispenser weatherproof
title: Outdoor Pet Camera With Treat Dispenser (Weatherproof)
meta: Weatherproof treat cameras for patios, kennels and yards.
intro: An outdoor treat camera needs an IP-rated housing and weatherproofing — most indoor cams will die outside in a season.

sections.body: IP65+ for rain exposure; sheltered porches can use less.
Outdoor units need a safe outdoor outlet or solar; plan the run.
A mesh node may be needed to reach the yard.

faq.q: Can I leave it out all winter?
faq.a: Only IP65+ rated and within temp spec.
Use sealed treats; add a desiccant pack.
